title: Tritonia deusta
taxonomy: Tritonia deusta is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the iris family. It is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant is a member of the genus Tritonia, which consists of various species of flowering plants. Tritonia deusta is known for its vibrant flowers and unique characteristics, making it a popular choice among botanists and horticulturists. The classification of Tritonia deusta reflects its distinct features and its place within the larger family of Iridaceae.
